title: Azka 3D - Arrows
description: A resourcepack that adds 3D models for arrows and spectral arrows.
body:
## Azka 3D - Arrows
A resourcepack that adds 3D models for arrows and spectral arrows. Requires [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) to work.
## Azka 3D Collection
This pack is part of [Azka 3D collection of resourcepacks](https://modrinth.com/collection/KwTiP9M9), all of which follow the same design philosophy:
- **Vanilla+** - The models are modified to improve their level of detail, add depth and in some rare instances make other changes, while being mostly faithful to the vanilla. Indents and extrusions are either 0.5 or 1 (or in very rare circumstances 0.25) pixel in height, matching the style of vanilla blocks.
- **No flickering** - To prevent Z-fighting (texture flickering), elements extending beyond the block boundary are marginally offset. The problem of shaders' pixelated shadows flickering, occuring in some of the other 3D resourcepacks, is eliminated as well.
- **Optimization** - The resourcepacks makes use of custom textures and transparency, to keep the polygon count as low as possible.
##
### Enjoy!
